description_long: This rectangular picnic basket features a sturdy, box-like structure with thick, dark woven fibers forming its exterior. The weave is intricate, with a repeating braided pattern along the sides, giving it a textured and decorative appearance. The interior is spacious and open, with the same woven material lining the bottom and sides, providing a consistent look throughout. The basket lacks a lid or handles, emphasizing its open-top design for easy access. The color palette is primarily a mix of dark gray and muted beige, creating a rustic yet modern aesthetic. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for carrying or storing items in an urban or outdoor setting.
description: A rectangular, open-top picnic basket with thick, dark woven fibers and a decorative braided pattern along the sides. The basket is sturdy, spacious, and lacks a lid or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the basket and the prominent braided weave pattern on the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the basket's depth and the continuation of the braided weave on the shorter side.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same braided weave pattern and open top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the basket's depth and woven texture.
attribute_weave_pattern: decorative braided weave with medium tightness and repeating raised loops along the sides
